reason: This is a religious reflection about seeking forgiveness and avoiding sins, using common Islamic spiritual language without any extremist content
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Islamic Teachings and Quotes
original_post: سُآِل آحَدُهُممً العآفِيًه ؟ قْآل آًن يَمُر اليْوم عليِك بِلاً ذنبً #آستغفِر الله مِن كُلِ ذًنبِ آعلَم ومِن كُل ذْنبٍ لاً آعلْم
